message:
style(ffs-repair): rustfmt assert! body in scrub daemon evidence test

Pure `cargo fmt --check` reformatting on the existing
"records.iter().any(...)" assert! block in
ffs-repair/src/pipeline.rs. The expression and its outer assert!
are unchanged; rustfmt re-wrapped the inline `assert!(...)`
across multiple lines to match the surrounding multi-line
assertion style. No behavior or coverage diff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
